posts.author: Singrauli
posts.text: Trump Might Be The Most Profitable Trader In American History — Trump’s 2026 ethics filing is insane: • Bought Dell stock → later promoted Dell from the White House → stock pumped • Bought Nvidia → govt approved chip deals right after • Bought Intel → posted bullish messages while govt held billions in Intel • Bought Palantir → handed them govt contracts • Bought Robinhood → federal program uses Robinhood Meanwhile Trump was allegedly trading up to $750M while sitting in the Oval Office. At this point the White House was starting to look less like a government and more like a private trading t…
